  • Hide All Code

ANCOM-BC2

Thomas Amble Karlsen

2026-02-12

1 Loading libraries

library(tidyverse) # general usage (wrangling, plotting...)
library(phyloseq) # exploring the microbiome
library(microViz) # wrangling and visualization of phyloseq data
library(ANCOMBC) # differential abundance analysis
library(ggh4x) # plotting
library(patchwork) # plotting
library(kableExtra) # formatting kable tables
library(tidytext) # column reordering

2 Loading data

readRDS("/Users/thomasamble/Downloads/Master/R_master/rds/phyloseq.rds") %>% 
  list2env(envir = .GlobalEnv)
## <environment: R_GlobalEnv>

3 Running ANCOM-BC2

First filtering out taxa with relative abundances below 0.1%, and subsetting to only bacterial taxa. Then converting back to count data, the required input for ANCOM-BC2. Then running ANCOM-BC2 with season and location as fixed effects, at species level, with a prevalence cutoff at 10%, meaning the species have to be present in at least 10% of the samples. ANCOM-BC2 was run twice, once grouped by season and once grouped by location. First running grouped by season:

metadata <- metadata %>% 
  mutate(season = factor(season))

holm_season <- main_ps %>% 
  tax_transform("compositional") %>% 
  tax_filter(min_sample_abundance = 0.001, tax_level = "unique",
             use_counts = FALSE, prev_detection_threshold = 0) %>% 
  ps_get(counts = TRUE) %>% 
  subset_taxa(top_rank == "Bacteria") %>% 
  ancombc2(fix_formula = "season + location",
           group = "season",
           p_adj_method = "holm",
           tax_level = "species",
           global = TRUE,
           pairwise = TRUE,
           alpha = 0.05,
           prv_cut = 0.10)
clean_season <- holm_season$res_pair %>% 
  rename(species = taxon) %>% 
  left_join(main_ps@tax_table %>% as.data.frame(),
              by = "species") %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = matches("^(lfc|se|q|passed_ss)_"),
               names_to = c(".value", "contrast"),
               names_pattern = "(lfc|se|q|passed_ss)_(.*)") %>%
  select(species, phylum, contrast, lfc, se, q, passed_ss) %>% 
  filter(q < 0.05, passed_ss == TRUE, abs(lfc) > 1) %>% 
  mutate(contrast = case_match(contrast,
                               "seasonSummer" ~ "Summer vs Autumn (adjusted for location)",
                               "seasonWinter" ~ "Winter vs Autumn (adjusted for location)",
                               "seasonWinter_seasonSummer" ~ "Winter vs Summer (adjusted for location)"),
         species = reorder_within(species, lfc, contrast))

plot_season <- clean_season %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = lfc, y = reorder(species, lfc),
             xmin = lfc - se, xmax = lfc + se, fill = phylum)) +
  geom_errorbar(width = 0.5) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "darkgray") +
  facet_wrap(facets = vars(contrast), scales = "free_y", space = "free_y") +
  scale_y_reordered() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Actinomycetota" = "#A6CEE3", 
                                "Bacillota" = "#1F78B4",
                                "Pseudomonadota" = "#B2DF8A",
                                "Bacteroidota" = "#33A02C",
                                "Verrucomicrobiota" = "#6A3D9A",
                                "Chloroflexota" = "#9F008A")) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.y = element_text(face = "italic")) +
  labs(x = "log2 fold change", y = "",
       title = "A) ANCOM-BC2 grouped by season")

Now running grouped by location:

holm_location <- main_ps %>% 
  tax_transform("compositional") %>% 
  tax_filter(min_sample_abundance = 0.001, tax_level = "unique",
             use_counts = FALSE, prev_detection_threshold = 0) %>% 
  ps_get(counts = TRUE) %>% 
  subset_taxa(top_rank == "Bacteria") %>% 
  ancombc2(fix_formula = "season + location",
           group = "location",
           p_adj_method = "holm",
           tax_level = "species",
           global = TRUE,
           pairwise = TRUE,
           alpha = 0.05,
           prv_cut = 0.10)

clean_location <- holm_location$res_pair %>% 
  rename(species = taxon) %>% 
  left_join(main_ps@tax_table %>% as.data.frame(),
              by = "species") %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = matches("^(lfc|se|q|passed_ss)_"),
               names_to = c(".value", "contrast"),
               names_pattern = "(lfc|se|q|passed_ss)_(.*)") %>%
  select(species, phylum, contrast, lfc, se, q, passed_ss) %>% 
  filter(q < 0.05, passed_ss == TRUE, abs(lfc) > 1) %>% 
  mutate(contrast = case_match(contrast,
                               "locationRøros" ~ "Røros vs Mo i Rana (adjusted for season)",
                               "locationTana_locationRøros" ~ "Tana vs Røros (adjusted for season)",
                               "locationTana" ~ "Tana vs Mo i Rana (adjusted for season"),
         species = reorder_within(species, lfc, contrast))

plot_location <- clean_location %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = lfc, y = reorder(species, lfc),
             xmin = lfc - se, xmax = lfc + se, fill = phylum)) +
  geom_errorbar(width = 0.3) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "darkgray") +
  facet_wrap(facets = vars(contrast), scales = "free_y", space = "free_y") +
  scale_y_reordered() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Actinomycetota" = "#A6CEE3", 
                                "Bacillota" = "#1F78B4",
                                "Pseudomonadota" = "#B2DF8A",
                                "Bacteroidota" = "#33A02C",
                                "Verrucomicrobiota" = "#6A3D9A",
                                "Chloroflexota" = "#9F008A")) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(face = "italic")) +
  labs(x = "log2 fold change", y = "",
       title = "B) ANCOM-BC2 grouped by location")

Plotting both ANCOM-BC2 plots together with patchwork.

plot_season + plot_location +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect")

ggsave("plots/ancombc2_holm.png", width = 15, height = 10)

Creating supplementary tables with exact values of ANCOM-BC2 metrics.

holm_season$res_pair %>% 
  rename(species = taxon) %>% 
  left_join(main_ps@tax_table %>% as.data.frame(),
              by = "species") %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = matches("^(lfc|se|q|passed_ss)_"),
               names_to = c(".value", "contrast"),
               names_pattern = "(lfc|se|q|passed_ss)_(.*)") %>%
  select(species, phylum, contrast, lfc, se, q, passed_ss) %>% 
  filter(q < 0.05, passed_ss == TRUE, abs(lfc) > 1) %>% 
  mutate(contrast = case_match(contrast,
                               "seasonSummer" ~ "Summer vs Autumn",
                               "seasonWinter" ~ "Winter vs Autumn",
                               "seasonWinter_seasonSummer" ~ "Winter vs Summer")) %>%
  arrange(contrast, desc(lfc)) %>% 
  print(n = 41) %>% 
  DT::datatable(options = list(scrollY = TRUE))
## # A tibble: 41 × 7
##    species                        phylum  contrast   lfc    se       q passed_ss
##    <chr>                          <chr>   <chr>    <dbl> <dbl>   <dbl> <lgl>    
##  1 Actinomyces sp. Z16            Actino… Summer …  2.56 0.635 1.07e-2 TRUE     
##  2 Propionibacterium australiense Actino… Summer …  2.36 0.469 1.04e-3 TRUE     
##  3 Berryella intestinalis         Actino… Summer …  2.33 0.553 6.90e-3 TRUE     
##  4 Berryella wangjianweii         Actino… Summer …  2.31 0.545 6.63e-3 TRUE     
##  5 Gordonibacter pamelaeae        Actino… Summer …  2.24 0.558 1.10e-2 TRUE     
##  6 Gordonibacter urolithinfaciens Actino… Summer …  2.15 0.554 1.57e-2 TRUE     
##  7 Xiamenia xianingshaonis        Actino… Summer …  2.13 0.498 5.99e-3 TRUE     
##  8 Eggerthella sp. YY7918         Actino… Summer …  2.10 0.522 1.09e-2 TRUE     
##  9 Arabiibacter massiliensis      Actino… Summer …  2.10 0.528 1.25e-2 TRUE     
## 10 Eggerthella guodeyinii         Actino… Summer …  2.08 0.524 1.24e-2 TRUE     
## 11 Raoultibacter timonensis       Actino… Summer …  2.05 0.514 1.18e-2 TRUE     
## 12 Eggerthella lenta              Actino… Summer …  1.99 0.520 1.72e-2 TRUE     
## 13 Denitrobacterium detoxificans  Actino… Summer …  1.92 0.530 2.86e-2 TRUE     
## 14 Adlercreutzia equolifaciens    Actino… Summer …  1.84 0.480 1.67e-2 TRUE     
## 15 Slackia heliotrinireducens     Actino… Summer …  1.83 0.489 2.10e-2 TRUE     
## 16 Slackia exigua                 Actino… Summer …  1.70 0.479 3.29e-2 TRUE     
## 17 Ruminococcus sp. JL13D9        Bacill… Summer …  1.67 0.433 1.64e-2 TRUE     
## 18 Paracoccus sp. SJTW-4          Pseudo… Winter … -1.05 0.243 5.81e-3 TRUE     
## 19 Streptomyces lividans          Actino… Winter …  2.10 0.466 3.74e-3 TRUE     
## 20 Enorma phocaeensis             Actino… Winter … -1.55 0.411 2.05e-2 TRUE     
## 21 Ruminococcus sp. JL13D9        Bacill… Winter … -1.78 0.401 4.35e-3 TRUE     
## 22 Olsenella sp. oral taxon 807   Actino… Winter … -1.85 0.435 7.01e-3 TRUE     
## 23 Slackia exigua                 Actino… Winter … -1.88 0.455 9.20e-3 TRUE     
## 24 Adlercreutzia hattorii         Actino… Winter … -1.92 0.463 8.88e-3 TRUE     
## 25 Adlercreutzia equolifaciens    Actino… Winter … -2.05 0.446 3.06e-3 TRUE     
## 26 Slackia heliotrinireducens     Actino… Winter … -2.11 0.454 2.68e-3 TRUE     
## 27 Denitrobacterium detoxificans  Actino… Winter … -2.20 0.489 3.82e-3 TRUE     
## 28 Eggerthella lenta              Actino… Winter … -2.23 0.480 2.73e-3 TRUE     
## 29 Eggerthella sp. YY7918         Actino… Winter … -2.24 0.502 4.25e-3 TRUE     
## 30 Raoultibacter timonensis       Actino… Winter … -2.29 0.480 2.08e-3 TRUE     
## 31 Arabiibacter massiliensis      Actino… Winter … -2.31 0.498 2.78e-3 TRUE     
## 32 Eggerthella guodeyinii         Actino… Winter … -2.38 0.477 1.25e-3 TRUE     
## 33 Gordonibacter urolithinfaciens Actino… Winter … -2.40 0.511 2.41e-3 TRUE     
## 34 Xiamenia xianingshaonis        Actino… Winter … -2.41 0.454 5.87e-4 TRUE     
## 35 Gordonibacter pamelaeae        Actino… Winter … -2.45 0.524 2.48e-3 TRUE     
## 36 Solobacterium moorei           Bacill… Winter … -2.49 0.577 6.02e-3 TRUE     
## 37 Streptomyces sp. HNM0561       Actino… Winter … -2.52 0.422 2.69e-4 TRUE     
## 38 Berryella intestinalis         Actino… Winter … -2.53 0.523 1.77e-3 TRUE     
## 39 Berryella wangjianweii         Actino… Winter … -2.57 0.513 1.20e-3 TRUE     
## 40 Propionibacterium australiense Actino… Winter … -2.57 0.422 1.07e-4 TRUE     
## 41 Actinomyces sp. Z16            Actino… Winter … -3.08 0.519 1.47e-4 TRUE
holm_location$res_pair %>% 
  rename(species = taxon) %>% 
  left_join(main_ps@tax_table %>% as.data.frame(),
              by = "species") %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = matches("^(lfc|se|q|passed_ss)_"),
               names_to = c(".value", "contrast"),
               names_pattern = "(lfc|se|q|passed_ss)_(.*)") %>%
  select(species, phylum, contrast, lfc, se, q, passed_ss) %>% 
  filter(q < 0.05, passed_ss == TRUE, abs(lfc) > 1) %>% 
  mutate(contrast = case_match(contrast,
                               "locationRøros" ~ "Røros vs Mo i Rana",
                               "locationTana_locationRøros" ~ "Tana vs Røros",
                               "locationTana" ~ "Tana vs Mo i Rana")) %>% 
  arrange(contrast, (desc(lfc))) %>% 
  print(n = 22) %>% 
  DT::datatable(options = list(scrollY = TRUE))
## # A tibble: 22 × 7
##    species                         phylum contrast   lfc    se       q passed_ss
##    <chr>                           <chr>  <chr>    <dbl> <dbl>   <dbl> <lgl>

##  3 Arthrobacter sp. PAMC 25486     Actin… Røros v…  2.37 0.705 3.75e-2 TRUE     
##  4 Arthrobacter sulfonylureivorans Actin… Røros v…  2.37 0.719 4.43e-2 TRUE     
##  5 Arthrobacter sp. CDRTa11        Actin… Røros v…  2.36 0.723 4.85e-2 TRUE     
##  6 Arthrobacter sp. A5             Actin… Røros v…  2.35 0.687 3.32e-2 TRUE     
##  7 Arthrobacter sp. PAMC25284      Actin… Røros v…  2.34 0.668 2.77e-2 TRUE     
##  8 Arthrobacter sp. R-11           Actin… Røros v…  2.28 0.620 1.87e-2 TRUE     
##  9 Paenarthrobacter aurescens      Actin… Røros v…  2.06 0.587 2.67e-2 TRUE     
## 10 Salmonella enterica             Pseud… Røros v…  1.71 0.334 6.69e-4 TRUE

## 12 Streptomyces lividans           Actin… Røros v…  1.39 0.393 2.63e-2 TRUE     
## 13 Bacteroides caecimuris          Bacte… Røros v… -1.27 0.345 1.78e-2 TRUE     
## 14 Pseudomonas monteilii           Pseud… Røros v… -1.45 0.344 4.75e-3 TRUE     
## 15 Phocaeicola vulgatus            Bacte… Røros v… -1.63 0.460 2.47e-2 TRUE     
## 16 Blautia massiliensis (ex Duran… Bacil… Røros v… -1.76 0.513 4.29e-2 TRUE     
## 17 Pradoshia sp. D12               Bacil… Røros v… -1.95 0.543 2.22e-2 TRUE
